meaning: n.选择,大批物品中剔出劣质货
examples: The culling of seal cubs has led to an outcry from environmental groups.
Culling is the choosing you do for yourself.
The toughest part for me was culling my board game collection.
Matthews has asked to postpone a ceremony to see him knighted because of February's culling.
The process begins with elimination, culling images that are blurry, duplicates or poorly exposed.
